whoWeAre.title: Who we are.
whoWeAre.paragraph1: Oneir (from the Greek Oneirus, "interpreter of dreams") is more than our name.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: Our mission is to partner with businesses, understand their vision, and deliver Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) solutions that turn their vision into reality.
whoWeAre.paragraph3: We believe ERP should adapt to the way businesses actually operate—not the other way around. That's why we take a consultative, hands-on approach, combining deep industry knowledge with practical technology expertise to deliver systems that are usable, scalable, and built for long-term success.
whoWeAre.paragraph4: For over 25 years, Oneir has supported organizations across manufacturing, distribution, retail, and food production. While industries change and technology evolves, one truth has remained constant: every client's vision is unique—and success depends on understanding it.

foundation.title: Our Foundation
foundation.mainText: Our ERP is built on a proven, enterprise-grade foundation trusted by telecom providers, financial institutions, and mission-critical organizations for speed, accuracy, and reliability.
foundation.subText: With future-ready architecture, including containerization and AI, our solutions are designed to evolve with your business.

howWeWork.intro: Our process begins with listening. We take time to understand your goals, challenges, and opportunities.
howWeWork.description: From there, we shape ERP solutions that do more than solve problems. They unlock value across operations, finance, and growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description:
Our mission is to partner with businesses, understand their vision, and provide ERP and accounting solutions that make that vision real.

For over 25 years, Oneir has supported industries from building supply to food manufacturing, from distribution to retail. One truth has always held: every client's vision is unique.

items.title: Discovery-First Approach
items.description: We start by understanding what matters most to your business, uncovering challenges and opportunities together.

items.title: Precision & Reliability
items.description: With decades of experience, we deliver solutions built on efficiency, accuracy, and results you can trust.

items.title: Industry Expertise
items.description: From wholesale to manufacturing, retail to construction—we understand the unique needs of your industry.

items.title: Innovation & Future-Ready
items.description: We build solutions with AI readiness and modern technology, ensuring your business stays ahead.

items.title: Partnership & Support
items.description: We're not just a vendor—we're your partner in growth, providing ongoing training and support.

cards.title: Clarity
cards.description: Making the complex simple so you can act with confidence.

cards.title: Trust
cards.description: Reliability built on decades of service and innovation.

cards.title: Evolution
cards.description: Constantly improving to keep you competitive.

cards.title: Customer centric
cards.description: Listening first and building lasting relationships.

cards.title: Results
cards.description: Turning your vision into measurable growth.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.description: Let's start with discovery. Together, we'll uncover what matters most to your business and build a solution that works.
